services.title: supported services
services.disclaimer: FreeSaveVideo is not affiliated with any of the services listed above.
tutorial.title: how to save on ios?
tutorial.intro: to save media conveniently on ios, you'll need to use a companion siri shortcut from the share sheet.
tutorial.step.2: press the "share" button in FreeSaveVideo's saving dialog.
tutorial.step.3: select the respective shortcut in the share sheet.
tutorial.outro: these shortcuts will work only from the FreeSaveVideo app, sharing links from other apps will not work.
wechat.notice.title: WeChat browser compatibility notice
wechat.notice.body: You are using the WeChat in-app browser. Downloads and Google sign-in can be blocked here. Please open this site in Chrome or Edge.
wechat.notice.copy_action: Copy this site link and open in another browser
wechat.notice.copied_body: In WeChat, tap the top-right menu and choose Open in Browser, then paste this link in Chrome or Edge.
wechat.notice.copy_failed_body: Please copy the current page URL manually, then open it in Chrome or Edge.
